proposal_text:
Title: Terra Reborn
Concept: Unravel ancient languages to rebirth a living world.
Website Product Description:
In a world scarred by forgotten mistakes, you are humanity's last hope to reclaim a vibrant future. Terra Reborn challenges you to go beyond traditional rebuilding by discovering and deciphering lost ancient languages. Every forgotten word you translate isn't just a puzzle solved; it's a vital piece of ecological wisdom that directly helps restore polluted waters, revive barren lands, and bring life back to devastated ecosystems.

As you embark on this intellectual and emotional journey, a melancholic AI, born from the world's grief, will guide your path, its own sorrow lessening as you reconnect humanity with nature's forgotten voice. Your choices will shape not only the environment but also the fate of communities, forcing difficult moral decisions with lasting consequences. Terra Reborn offers a unique experience where true renewal comes from understanding, healing, and rediscovering a harmonious way of life.

Title: Consequence of Command: A New World
Concept: Your command, your world, your war.
Website Product Description: In a world on the brink, *your* decisions hold the ultimate power. As commander, you face a profound moral dilemma: will you defend the distant outer colonies, risking vital resources, or abandon them to preserve your core strength? This isn't just a story choice; it's the foundation of your entire campaign.

Choose to support the loyalists, and unlock unique diplomatic research and specialized missions focused on alliances and advanced resource management. Your society thrives on cooperation, building a stable future.

However, should you be forced to forsake the colonies, your people will adapt out of sheer necessity. This desperate path unlocks high-risk, high-reward technologies and missions reflecting innovation born from urgency, perhaps even leading to unstable, cutting-edge weaponry.

Every choice you make, from the fate of your people to the technologies you pursue, reshapes your army, your society, and the very fabric of your world. Witness loyalists emerge or dissenters rise, each influencing unit availability and your strategic options. Experience a living, breathing conflict where your command truly matters, forging a unique legacy with every playthrough. How will *you* write history?
